description_long: This is a classic cylindrical mailbox with a rounded top and a flat bottom, mounted on a single wooden post. The mailbox is painted a muted green color and features a raised mail flag on the right side, which is used to signal outgoing mail. The front of the mailbox has a hinged door with a subtle embossed 'MAIL' label, and the door appears to open outward for mail retrieval. The body of the mailbox has two horizontal ridges for structural reinforcement and visual detail. The post is a simple, rectangular wooden beam with a natural brown finish, providing sturdy support. The mailbox is designed for outdoor use, typically found along streets or at the end of driveways in residential neighborhoods.
description: A green, cylindrical mailbox with a raised mail flag, mounted on a single wooden post and featuring a front-hinged door with 'MAIL' embossed on it.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the green mailbox, the raised mail flag, and the supporting wooden post.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the curved back of the mailbox and the top of the wooden post, with the flag barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the mailbox's length, the flag on the far side, and the wooden post.
description_view_3: Front view showing the mailbox door with 'MAIL' embossed, the mail slot area, and the post directly beneath.
